chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-93 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.536/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Arif Jhandeer, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Shareef Solangi, Assistant A.G Sindh. = Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant is a poor person and is not in a position to furnish the required surety in the shape of cash and that he intends to furnish surety in the shape of a solvency certificate to the extent of the same amount. He submits that an application to this effect was moved before the learned trial court under section 151 C.P.C but the same was not considered vide order dated 13.10.2025. He further submits that the applicant is ready to deposit the solvency certificate equivalent to the cheque amount and requests that time may be granted to the applicant to furnish the surety before learned trial court. Mr. Aziz Ahmed Laghari holds brief for Mr. Abdul Razzaq Dars, Advocate for the respondent and recorded his no objection to provide an opportunity to the applicant to furnish the solvency certificate within one week. In view of the above, the instant Civil Revision Application is allowed and impugned order dated 13.10.2025 is set-aside subject to furnish solvent surety equally to the cheque amount within one week to the satisfaction of the learned trial court. The learned trial court is directed to open the side of applicant in accordance with law after furnishing solvency certificate. The Civil Revision Application is disposed of in the above terms along with the listed application.

The learned trial court is directed to open the side of applicant in accordance with law after furnishing solvency certificate. The Civil Revision Application is disposed of in the above terms along with the listed application. JUDGE *Faisal*
